document.source_title: IPL 2026 | Kartik Sharma shows he has it in him to make it big

claims.claim_text: Kartik Sharma recorded his highest score of 71 against LSG.
claims.evidence_text: Kartik Sharma, who was picked for a staggering ₹14.20 crore, stood tall in an otherwise forgettable night for CSK, recording his highest score of 71 (42b, 6x4, 5x6).

claims.claim_text: Kartik Sharma is the team’s third-highest run-scorer in the ongoing edition.
claims.evidence_text: the youngster has steadily made valuable contributions, and he is the team’s third-highest run-scorer (244 runs) in the ongoing edition.
